user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Hi,

I’m just following up to make sure everything is still working smoothly since we marked your ticket as resolved a few days ago.

If everything is okay, no action is needed. If you’re still seeing any issues or something has come up, reply here and we’ll be happy to help.

Best,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed the user's request to draft a follow-up message for a resolved ticket, adhering to its role as a support agent.
